title: ElevenLabs node returns 401 error on free account
symptom: When executing the 'Convert text to speech' operation in the ElevenLabs node, a '401 Authorization failed' error occurs despite successful credential tests.
not_this_if: Upgraded to a paid ElevenLabs account
root_cause: The ElevenLabs node in n8n requires a paid account to function correctly. Users on free accounts will encounter a 401 error even if their API key is valid and tests pass, leading to confusion.
fix_steps: Upgrade your ElevenLabs account to a paid plan
Retry executing the workflow with the ElevenLabs node
agent_instruction: Upgrade to a paid ElevenLabs account to resolve the 401 error.
